title: Search Index Architecture Overview
description: High-level architecture of the search cluster including index layout, compaction flow, shard distribution, and routing logic.

sections.index_structure: Documents stored across hot and warm shards with segment-based indexing and background compaction.
sections.compaction_flow: Compaction runs periodically or is triggered during shard merges. Must be staggered to avoid IO saturation.
sections.routing_logic: Coordinators distribute queries by shard affinity and field mappings, falling back to replica routing when required.
failure_modes: Analyzer mismatch due to partial deployments
Corrupt segment requiring full shard rebuild

title: Search Cluster Operations Runbook
description: Operational procedures for the search cluster covering compaction tuning, shard balancing, and performance troubleshooting.

sections.compaction_tuning: Stagger compaction windows; avoid running multiple large-shard compactions concurrently.
sections.shard_health: Use shard-metadata validator; triggers remote rebuild if corruption detected.
sections.coordinator_load: Coordinator nodes must be scaled independently when aggregation workload increases.

title: Inventory Metadata & Vendor Table Schema
description: Defines the metadata schema used for vendor, SKU, and stock-level mappings and guidelines for safe migrations.

sections.schema: Vendor tables linked by vendor_id with FK constraints; SKU metadata stored separately in product_meta.
sections.migration_guidelines: Always run pre-migration validator and backfill missing vendor rows before enabling new schema.
known_risks: Orphaned vendor rows after partial migration
Schema mismatch causing NPE in lookups

title: Inventory Sync & Concurrency Runbook
description: Detailed operations guide for sync jobs, concurrency rules, GC tuning, and delta-feed reliability.

sections.delta_sync: Ensure delta-feed scheduler is healthy and feeds are replayed if gaps detected across regions.
sections.concurrency_rules: AdjustDelta must use lock or CAS to prevent double-decrements under load.
sections.batch_sync: Throttle worker counts to avoid DB contention during nightly sync jobs.

title: Orders Service Architecture & Data Flows
description: Core architecture covering order lifecycle, workflow engine behavior, region mapping, and fraud-check integrations.

sections.workflow: Order lifecycle includes create → verify → pay → pack → ship. Workflow engine requires idempotent event processing.
sections.fraud_check: Fraud-check flags must be validated per region; config merges must include region_A flag.
sections.config_rules: Region-mapping must be schema-validated before promotion.

title: Orders Reliability & Deployment Runbook
description: Operational guide covering container deployments, workflow integrity, and schema compatibility across services.

sections.deployments: Verify container checksums before rollout; failed pushes must be purged at node-level.
sections.workflow_integrity: Engine must dedupe events on failover; sequence mismatch triggers reconciliation.
sections.region_config: Region configs must be validated using versioned schema.

title: Payments Service Core Architecture
description: Overview of payment submission, settlement, ledger pipelines, and external gateway interactions.

sections.settlement_flow: Settlement is asynchronous; ledger writes must be buffered and retried on slow IO.
sections.callback_processing: Callbacks must be idempotent with sequence numbers for ordering.
sections.key_rotation: API key and certificate rotations must be synchronized across worker groups.

title: Payments Ops & Integration Runbook
description: Operational procedures for the payments service including ledger optimizations, retry policies, and third-party gateway handling.

sections.ledger_io: Failover to alternate AZ in case of high write latency.
sections.otp_strategy: Fallback provider must be enabled when primary latency exceeds threshold.
sections.thread_pool: Avoid deadlocks by tuning queue and max-pool-size parameters.

title: Catalog Service Architecture Blueprint
description: Documentation for the catalog indexing pipeline, facet aggregation engine, CDN rules, and cache-layer behavior.

sections.facet_engine: Facet serialization must handle nulls and incompatible schema versions.
sections.cdn_rules: CDN rewrite must preserve image path prefixes; misconfigured templates break asset URLs.
sections.merge_index: Secondary merge-index must remain consistent across nodes; corruption requires rebuild.

title: Catalog Ingestion & CDN Runbook
description: Runbook for catalog ingestion pipeline, CDN configs, and troubleshooting prefix-cache, merge-index, and image-processing flows.

sections.ingestion: Kafka topics must have sufficient partitions; backlog requires replay with consumer rebalance.
sections.cdn_template: Template variables must include prefix and region; missing vars break all image URLs.
sections.image_imports: Large imports cause heap fragmentation; use offline pipelines for batches >5GB.

title: Auth Service Architecture Overview
description: Architecture of authentication flows including MFA, token verification, hashing algorithms, and Redis-based session storage.

sections.hashing: Legacy hashing algorithms must be supported during migration windows.
sections.sessions: Redis cluster failover may cause session loss; use persistence with warmups.
sections.validation: Captcha and phone validation rules must be updated per region.

title: Auth Ops & Reliability Runbook
description: Operations manual for auth reliability, log management, JWK rotations, and CPU-hotspot elimination.

sections.jwk_rotation: JWK TTL must be short enough to avoid stale keys causing verification failures.
sections.logging: Audit logs must be async when disk is slow; check writer backlog.
sections.session_recovery: Failover scenarios require session warmups to reduce login failures.

title: Auth Token & Security Guidelines
description: Security guidelines for token signing, JWK management, validation flows, and multi-region verification.

sections.token_validation: Token validation must fallback to cached key only when verifier times out.
sections.phone_rules: Mobile number prefixes evolve; validator must maintain updated prefix-map.
sections.mfa_rules: MFA failures often originate from bad templates or stale user attributes.

title: Shipping Engine Architecture
description: Coverage of shipping engine flows including label generation, courier integration, HMAC signing, and ETA calculations.

sections.courier_api: Ensure DNS records and HMAC secrets are synced across nodes.
sections.eta_calc: Timezone libraries must be pinned to avoid normalization regressions.
sections.rate_cache: Rate cache must be invalidated when carrier updates rates.

title: Shipping Ops & Troubleshooting Guide
description: Operational guide for DNS failures, label generation errors, tracking sync flows, and HMAC secret rotations.

sections.tracking_sync: Tracking sync must alert on stale updates or expired credentials.
sections.pdf_generation: International labels require Unicode font package.
sections.credentials: Carrier API credentials must have expiry alerts enabled.

title: Notifications Architecture Blueprint
description: Messaging architecture for SMS, email, and push notifications, including fanout distribution and template rendering.

sections.fanout: Fanout must run in parallel batches to sustain mega-campaign throughput.
sections.template_engine: Templates must include language fallback; HTML validators required.
sections.routing: Priority routing maps must cover all event types.

title: Notifications Ops & Template Runbook
description: Runbook for template validation, FCM credentials, batch processing, and fixing stuck fanout queues.

sections.template_validation: HTML validator must detect unclosed tags; SMS templates must support all language codes.
sections.fcm_creds: FCM secret rotation must be validated in staging before production.
sections.batching: Infinite-loop safeguards required for push-batch aggregator.

title: Notifications Configuration Reference
description: Configuration guidelines for notification routing, priority mapping, and template schema rules.

sections.priority_map: All event types must have priority entries including promo.high.
sections.routing_rules: Channel routing rules must include SMS fallback.
sections.template_schema: Template-json schema must include translation-map for multi-language templates.

title: Notifications Template & Localization Guide
description: Templates and localization specifications for SMS, email, and push payloads.

sections.localization: All templates require fallback for unsupported locale codes such as fr-CA.
sections.schema_rules: Payload schema version must be validated to avoid serializer crashes.
sections.delivery_flows: Stale or failed templates must be requeued after patch.
